text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Is this the field? Oh, yeah, I can see a bunch of
people gathering.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can't believe you offered to help out at an
amateur baseball game... You're already so busy
with your trainer duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days ago, the folks from the local shopping
district reached out to me to ask if I'd like to
participate in a baseball game.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess everyone does do a lot for me...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... Ahh, fine. Just don't get too worked up and
injure yourself while you're playing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You try too hard as it is, even with your everyday stuff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, it's finally time for the shopping district
baseball teams to face off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither team gives an inch, and the score remains
0-0 as the match really starts to heat up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is getting intense. ...And you look
completely worn out, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know you're putting in a heap of effort, but I
think it's about time you subbed out with
someone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're all fired up about this, huh? ...Oh, wait, I
get it. You're giving this your all because of
everything they do for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Listen, I'm going to grab you a drink, so you just
sit here and rest for a while, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, what a handful... Hmm, where's the
organizer tent again?

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Man
text_block_list.text:
Juuust falling short, huh? The effort's there, but
the points aren't coming...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Oh, are they... talking about Trainer?)

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Lady
text_block_list.text:
Probably nerves, right? Joining the team on such
short notice means being surrounded by players
you don't even know...

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Man
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... C'mon, there must be something we can
do to perk that trainer up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (...I kinda feel like I've heard this before.)

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Folk
text_block_list.text: Natieeeee! Yeah, just like that! You go, Natieee!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Meeting you and watching you grow into such a
fine Umamusume has been the pleasure of our
lives."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Whenever I tried to do my best, it was Trainer
and everyone else who had my back...)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (I can't just stand around worrying. This time, it's my turn...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the bottom of the ninth. I step up to
the plate needing only a single hit for a walk-off
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The player on the mound has a rocket arm and
even made it to the bench of the high school
nationals when he was young.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've already got two strikes, so this feels like the
end of the line... But suddenly...
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can win this, Trainer! Just one hit! Nail this
one and you get the win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Let's go! You can do it! Come on, everyone! One,
two, three!

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Folk
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! Go for the win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: L-let's go, Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While clearly bashful, Nice Nature cheers me on.
Before I know it, everyone around her has joined
in too. I have to win this for all of them!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: THWACK!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You did it! You nailed it, Trainer! That's a home
run! A walk-off victory!
choice_data_list: I couldn't have done it without your support!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Urk... You make me blush when you look at me
with that gleam in your eyes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...And I'm the one who should be thanking you.
Thanks for always being in my corner.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll just have to keep doing my best...
Gaaah! That didn't sound like me at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might be embarrassed, but Nice Nature's
cheers came from the bottom of her heart. What
a truly unforgettable day!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Nice. Way to go, Trainer! Great job!
choice_data_list: It was all thanks to your cheers, Nature!
It was all thanks to your cheers, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I didn't do anything special. It all came down
to your talent and effort, Trainer. But still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess cheering you on was worth it in the end.
Maybe I'll come to support you at the next game.
...Maybe not though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Nice Nature shyly averts her gaze, I can
really feel the strength of our bond. What a
fantastic day!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was so embarrassing! This just isn't like me at all!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, come on, don't yell like that! Everyone'll
look! That's it, I'm changing out of this getup!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I'm glad my efforts paid off in the end,
though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Nice Nature still struggles to be open
about her emotions, I can tell just how she feels.
What a precious experience!
